title: Parasytes Reloaded
description: Something has awakened and is slowly corrupting your world. Fight to survive, or you will become one of them
body:
A mysterious entity has emerged in your world. It spreads like a parasite, infecting and transforming any creature it touches. You have no idea where it came from, what it wants, or how to stop it. All you know is one thing: you must survive, or become one of them. Every day is a fight for your life as the infection spreads, corrupting everything in its path. Will you outlast the plague, or fall prey to the parasitic force taking over the world? The choice is yours, but time is running out.
<details>
